DFStringFlagRepoGitHashDynamicString.mechanism: Stores a dynamic string that represents the Git hash for version control.
DFStringFlagRepoGitHashDynamicString.purpose: Helps developers track changes in the codebase more efficiently.

FStringFlagRepoGitHashFastString.mechanism: Uses a fast string representation of the Git hash for quicker access.
FStringFlagRepoGitHashFastString.purpose: Improves performance by allowing faster retrieval of version information.

DFStringFlipTimeStampDynamicString.mechanism: Holds a dynamic string that indicates the timestamp for flipping features.
DFStringFlipTimeStampDynamicString.purpose: Enables precise timing for when new features are activated for players.

FStringFlipTimeStampFastString.mechanism: Provides a quick string representation of the flip timestamp.
FStringFlipTimeStampFastString.purpose: Enhances performance by allowing faster checks on when features change.
